target.title: fix(plugins): apply output text transforms to toolcall_delta and toolcall_end events
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`toolcall_delta` and `toolcall_end` stream events bypass the output text replacement pipeline. When plugin `textTransforms` mask PII tokens (e.g. `"John Smith"` â†’ `"[MASKED]"`), the LLM generates tool calls using masked tokens. Since these event types aren't processed, masked tokens leak into tool arguments and external systems.

## Root Cause

`transformAssistantEventText` handles `text_delta`, `text_end`, `partial`, `message`, and `error` â€” but not `toolcall_delta` or `toolcall_end`. The `stream.result()` path also lacked tool-call argument handling.

## Fix

- Add `toolcall_delta` to the delta replacement path
- Add `toolcall_end.toolCall` handling via `transformToolCallText` â€” transforms `arguments` recursively, **preserves `name`** (renaming tools breaks routing)
- Add `arguments` transform to `transformContentText` for `stream.result()` / `done.message` tool-call blocks

Closes #97761

## Change Type

- [x] Bug fix

## Scope

- [x] Agents (plugin text transform pipeline)

## Evidence

### Test suite (project runner)

```text
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/plugin-text-transforms.test.ts

 âś“ plugin text transforms > merges registered transform groups in order
 âś“ plugin text transforms > applies ordered string and regexp replacements
 âś“ plugin text transforms > rewrites system prompt and message text content before transport
 âś“ plugin text transforms > wraps stream functions with inbound and outbound replacements
 âś“ plugin text transforms > applies output replacements to toolcall_delta and toolcall_end events

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  5 passed (5)
   Start at  19:22:02
   Duration  1.04s

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 9.27s
```

No regressions. New test covers all three paths:
1. **toolcall_delta** â€” delta text `[MASKED]` correctly restored to `"John"`
2. **toolcall_end** â€” nested toolCall arguments recursively transformed; tool `name` preserved (`"search"` untouched)
3. **stream.result()** â€” done.message tool-call content blocks transformed

### Production code verification (npm build artifacts)

Patched the compiled `dist/text-transforms.runtime-*.js` from `openclaw@2026.6.10` and exercised the production functions directly:

```text
$ node verify-patch.mjs

[toolcall_delta] âś… {"name":"John","id":"123"}
[toolcall_end]  âś… name: search args: {"query":"John","nested":{"note":"ask John again"}}
[result]       âś… args: {"text":"John"}

âś… ALL PATHS PASS â€” fix verified on production code
```

### Formatting & whitespace

```text
$ pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/plugin-text-transforms.ts src/agents/plugin-text-transforms.test.ts
All matched files use the correct format.
Finished in 16ms on 2 files using 1 threads.

$ git diff --check
(clean â€” no whitespace issues)
```

## Security Impact

- New permissions? No
- Secrets handling changed? No
- New network calls? No
target.author: zoowh
